keyEvents.text: Goal! Portugal 1, Congo DR 0. João Neves (Portugal) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Pedro Neto with a cross.
Bernardo Silva (Portugal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Chancel Mbemba (Congo DR) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Portugal 1, Congo DR 1. Yoane Wissa (Congo DR) header from very close range to the top left corner. Assisted by Arthur Masuaku with a cross following a corner.
First Half ends, Portugal 1, Congo DR 1.
Substitution, Portugal. Francisco Conceição replaces Bernardo Silva.
Second Half begins Portugal 1, Congo DR 1.
Substitution, Congo DR. Noah Sadiki replaces Ngal'ayel Mukau.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Portugal. Rafael Leão replaces Pedro Neto.
Substitution, Portugal. Nélson Semedo replaces Nuno Mendes.
Substitution, Congo DR. Charles Pickel replaces Edo Kayembe.
Substitution, Congo DR. Joris Kayembe replaces Arthur Masuaku.
Substitution, Portugal. Gonçalo Ramos replaces Vitinha.
Substitution, Congo DR. Gédéon Kalulu replaces Aaron Wan-Bissaka.
Substitution, Congo DR. Simon Banza replaces Cédric Bakambu.
Nélson Semedo (Portugal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Tomás Araújo (Portugal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half ends, Portugal 1, Congo DR 1.
